creator: uffe@uffe.org
text:
Hello,

Thanks for your suggestions to improvements.


In respect to the non-working trigger it was broken late September by bapt@ with commit:

r369019 | bapt | 2014-09-23 11:56:54 +0200 (Tue, 23 Sep 2014)

See: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=194205

It was fixed again with commit:

Author: bapt
Date: Fri Oct 17 23:36:26 UTC 2014
New revision: 371088



nullmailer packages built right now seems to work as expected.

Could it be that you've hit the problem with an svn extract within the above mentioned "defect" period ?
